brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate as the US-Iran ceasefire frays, while AI industry doubts emerge and cultural events like Emmy nominations and Wimbledon changes dominate headlines. Research papers explore interactive AI, visualization tools, and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: US-Iran ceasefire frays with threats of war and oil market volatility; immigration enforcement leads to shootings; AI industry faces skepticism; Emmy nominations and Wimbledon cultural shifts also notable.
papers_summary: Papers focus on AI agents for coding, interactive visualization for weather and embeddings, and EEG-based brain-computer interfaces, advancing human-AI collaboration.

todays_image.caption: Just as the unassuming Lobophora algae quietly reshapes coral reefs, the hype around Big A.I. may have overlooked the subtle, unpredictable currents that now challenge our grand investment.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
